category_sources: Official NCBI documentation identifies BLAST as sequence similarity search software.
source_facts.description expands BLAST as Basic Local Alignment Search Tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is blast; official NCBI documentation uses BLAST.
docs_sources: Official BLAST Help and NCBI Toolkit pages document BLAST and its implementation.
Official NCBI Bookshelf hosts the BLAST Command Line Applications User Manual.
repo_sources: Official BLAST developer info says the maintained BLAST implementation is part of the NCBI C++ Toolkit.
Official NCBI C++ Toolkit book says current public releases are available at github.com/ncbi/ncbi-cxx-toolkit-public.
tags_sources: Official NCBI BLAST manual documents command-line sequence search applications.
source_facts.description identifies the Basic Local Alignment Search Tool.
